ddls:
CREATE TABLE "restaurants" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restaurant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the restaurant */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the restaurant is located */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the restaurant */,
  "province" TEXT /* Province where the restaurant is located */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the restaurant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the restaurant */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand the restaurant belongs to */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager of the restaurant */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the restaurant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "websites" (
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each website */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant the website belongs to */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the website */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the website */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the website */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the website was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the website (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("website_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_websites_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "digital_marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant the campaign is for */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the digital marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform where the campaign is run (e.g., Facebook, Google Ads) */,
  "campaign_type" TEXT /* Type of campaign (e.g., social media, email, PPC) */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "goal" TEXT /* Goal of the campaign (e.g., increase brand awareness, drive sales) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., planned, active, completed) */,
  "spend" REAL /* Amount spent on the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_digital_marketing_campaigns_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "online_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant the review is for */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was posted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given in the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text content of the review */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the review (e.g., Google, Yelp) */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_email" TEXT /* Email of the reviewer */,
  "response" TEXT /* Restaurant's response to the review */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_online_reviews_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of feedback */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant the feedback is for */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text content of the feedback */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the feedback (e.g., email, in-person) */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., suggestion, complaint, praise) */,
  "response" TEXT /* Restaurant's response to the feedback */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant the metric is for */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., Google Analytics, internal tracking) */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., traffic, engagement, conversion rate) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., visits, likes, sales) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reputation_management" (
  "management_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reputation management action */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant the action is for */,
  "management_date" TEXT /* Date the reputation management action was taken */,
  "management_action" TEXT /* Action taken for reputation management */,
  "management_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the reputation management action */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the reputation management action (e.g., social media, review site) */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., response, deletion, promotion) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the action (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "follow_up_needed" TEXT /* Indicates if follow-up is needed (e.g., yes, no) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("management_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reputation_management_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "third_party_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each third-party service */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant the service is integrated with */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the third-party service */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date the service was integrated */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service (e.g., review management, analytics) */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the service */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the integration (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_third_party_services_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., franchise owner, marketing manager, admin) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, data update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the system */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
